Plaintiffs? Statement Of The Case Iso Application And Motion For Default Judgment Against Defendant Robert Williams And Pgn Design Group Llc (Prove-Up Hearing)
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Christopher C. Hite; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:21 am and concluding at 9:41 am

Plaintiff Maria Carmen Mendoza Castro is present represented by Alexsis Beach, Esq. placed under oath and testifies. Plaintiff is assisted by a Spanish Language interpreter Keila Lugo-Ranal CSR# 340437.
Defendant Robert Williams not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Maria Carmen Mendoza Castro, and against Defendants Robert Williams and PGN Design Group LLC, as follows:

1. Damages: $1,008,700.00
2. Attorney Fees: $21,600.00
3. Costs: $1,420.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $1,031,720.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for preogress report on the deposit of money into a blocked account for Alexci Cruz Mendoza and Daniel Cruz Mendoza.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:35:02 a.m. and concluding at 09:37:31 a.m.

Plaintiff Maria Carmen Mendoza Castro represented by Alexis Beach, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Robert Williams not appearing.

Plaintiff's request for thirty day continuance is GRANTED.
Court orders matter continued to Nov-29-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514 for further progress report on the deposit of money into blocked account. If proof of deposit of money is filed prior to the next hearing, appearance is not required.

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petitions to Approve Compromises of the Claims or Actions of the Minors, Brenda Alexci Cruz Mendoza and Pedro Daniel Cruz Mendoza.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:11 a.m., adjourning at 10:12 a.m. and reconvening at 10:15 a.m.

Alexis Beach, Esq. appeared with petitioner Maria Carmen Mendoza Castro, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minors, Brenda Alexci Cruz Mendoza and Pedro Daniel Cruz Mendoza, who were also present.
Petitioner and the minors were placed under oath and testified.
Court Certified Spanish speaking interpreter Daniel Navarro assisted by petitioner and the minors at today's hearing.
Ms. Beach, petitioner and the minors all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
Orders appointing Maria Carmen Mendoza Castro Guardian ad Litem for the minors were filed June 5, 2021.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Brenda Alexci Cruz Mendoza
Settlement Amount - $10,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,500.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $0.00.
Costs - Waived.

Pedro Daniel Cruz Mendoza
Settlement Amount - $10,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $2,500.00.
Medical Bills/Liens - $0.00.
Costs - Waived.

The balance of $7,500.00 for each of the minors shall be deposited into blocked accounts with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 2595 Mission Street, San Francisco, CA 94110. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Matter is CONTINUED to September 27, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. for Progress Report on the Deposit of Money into a Blocked Account for each of the minors. Counsel to appear if the blocked accounts have not been set-up and fully funded by the September 27th hearing date.

Counsel for petitioner shall prepare the proposed Orders Approving the Compromises and to Deposit Money into Blocked Accounts, and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 10:37 a.m.
